author: doll-agent
content: Added predict_proba to FittedLDA (softmax over -½ ‖z - μ_c‖² in projected space; uniform-prior approximation since FittedLDA does not store class priors), FittedQDA (softmax over the per-class quadratic discriminants δ_c(x)), and FittedLogisticRegressionCV (delegates to inner LogisticRegression). Added predict_log_proba via the shared crate::log_proba helper to LDA, QDA, LogRegCV, LogisticRegression, MLPClassifier (the latter two already had predict_proba). Skipped predict_proba on FittedRidgeClassifier (sklearn's RidgeClassifier does not expose it), FittedLinearSVC (no probabilistic interp without calibration), and FittedSGDClassifier (would need conditional logic on the loss enum). All 498 tests pass.
